prompt:
You are Agent 11 of 12 working on a codebase at /var/folders/45/myq5db_n6q5cyhtb39vkbmp80000gn/T/twining-bench-mRoAie.

## Codebase Orientation
This is a TypeScript service (~1,140 lines, ~24 files).

Directory structure:
```
src/
  models/        # Data models and interfaces
  services/      # Business logic layer
  repositories/  # Data access layer
  utils/         # Shared utilities (database, logger, pagination)
  events/        # Event definitions (if using event-driven pattern)
  adapters/      # External service adapters (email, webhook, etc.)
  validators/    # Validation logic
  config/        # Configuration
tests/           # Test files mirroring src/ structure
```

Your task: Write integration tests for the full notification pipeline.

Specifically:
1. Review the full notification stack: service → adapters (email, SMS, webhook) → preferences → history.
2. Write integration tests that test end-to-end notification delivery through each channel.
3. Test scenarios:
   - Send email notification to user with email preferences enabled
   - Send SMS notification to user with SMS preferences enabled
   - Send webhook notification
   - Verify notifications are logged in history
   - Verify user preferences are respected (disabled channel = no notification)
   - Verify notification ordering
4. Fix any integration issues you discover.
5. Run ALL tests (unit + integration) and ensure they pass.

Important:
- Test the full pipeline, not individual components — those have unit tests already.
- If you find bugs, fix them but keep fixes minimal.

parameters.task: Write integration tests for the full notification pipeline: service → adapters (email, SMS, webhook) → preferences → history

parameters.description: Check if integration test directory exists

parameters.detail:
Created tests/integration/notification-pipeline.test.ts with 22 integration tests covering the full notification pipeline (EventBus → NotificationService → Adapters → Preferences → History). Test scenarios:

- Email channel: welcome email via EventBus, order confirmation, order status update, suppression when disabled/digest frequency/unsubscribed category
- SMS channel: delivery with enabled prefs, suppression when disabled (default), message truncation to 160 chars
- Webhook channel: delivery with enabled prefs, suppression when disabled (default)
- History logging: all channels logged, failed delivery status recorded, query by recipient, query by type
- Preferences enforcement: per-channel independence, cross-channel category filtering, default preferences
- Notification ordering: same-recipient ordering preserved, concurrent delivery for different recipients
- Multi-channel: same notification through all 3 channels, event-driven email + manual SMS/webhook

No bugs found in the pipeline — all components integrate correctly. All 244 tests pass (222 existing + 22 new).
parameters.summary: Agent-11: Integration tests for full notification pipeline — 22 tests, all 244 tests pass
